mapper.sql: id, workNo, realName, eName, compID, depID, jobID, reportTo, wfreportTo, empStatus, jobStatus, empType, sex, birthday, email, mobile, telphone, avatar, remark, state, user_id, custom1, custom2, custom3, custom4, custom5
mapper.insert: insert into t_user_info (workNo, realName, eName, compID, depID, jobID, reportTo, wfreportTo, empStatus, jobStatus, empType, sex, birthday, email, mobile, telphone, avatar, remark, state, user_id, custom1, custom2, custom3, custom4, custom5) values (#{workNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{eName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{compID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{depID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{jobID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{reportTo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{wfreportTo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{empStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{jobStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{empType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sex,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{telphone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{custom1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{custom2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{custom3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{custom4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{custom5,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into t_user_info
id,
workNo,
realName,
eName,
compID,
depID,
jobID,
reportTo,
wfreportTo,
empStatus,

empType,

birthday,

mobile,

avatar,
remark,
state,
user_id,
custom1,

mapper.update:
update t_user_info
workNo = #{workNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
realName = #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
eName = #{eName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
compID = #{compID,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depID = #{depID,jdbcType=INTEGER},
jobID = #{jobID,jdbcType=INTEGER},
reportTo = #{reportTo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
wfreportTo = #{wfreportTo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
empStatus = #{empStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
jobStatus = #{jobStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
empType = #{empType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sex = #{sex,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
birthday = #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mobile = #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
telphone = #{telphone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
custom1 = #{custom1,jdbcType=INTEGER},
custom2 = #{custom2,jdbcType=INTEGER},
custom3 = #{custom3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
custom4 = #{custom4,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
custom5 = #{custom5,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_user_info set workNo = #{workNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, realName = #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, eName = #{eName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, compID = #{compID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, depID = #{depID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, jobID = #{jobID,jdbcType=INTEGER}, reportTo = #{reportTo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, wfreportTo = #{wfreportTo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, empStatus = #{empStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, jobStatus = #{jobStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, empType = #{empType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sex = #{sex,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, birthday = #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mobile = #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, telphone = #{telphone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, state = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, custom1 = #{custom1,jdbcType=INTEGER}, custom2 = #{custom2,jdbcType=INTEGER}, custom3 = #{custom3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, custom4 = #{custom4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, custom5 = #{custom5,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select * from t_user_info
id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
workNo = #{workNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
realName = #{realName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
eName = #{eName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compID = #{compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

jobStatus = #{jobStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

birthday = #{birthday, jdbcType=DATE} AND

custom3 = #{custom3, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
custom4 = #{custom4, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
custom5 = #{custom5, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND

select count(1) from t_user_info
id = #{id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
workNo = #{workNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
realName = #{realName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
eName = #{eName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compID = #{compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depID = #{depID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

jobStatus = #{jobStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

sex = #{sex, jdbcType=SMALLINT} AND
birthday = #{birthday, jdbcType=DATE} AND
email = #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
mobile = #{mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
telphone = #{telphone, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
avatar = #{avatar, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
remark = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
state = #{state, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

select * from t_user_info
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
workNo = #{model.workNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
realName = #{model.realName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
eName = #{model.eName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compID = #{model.compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depID = #{model.depID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobID = #{model.jobID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
reportTo = #{model.reportTo, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wfreportTo = #{model.wfreportTo, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empStatus = #{model.empStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobStatus = #{model.jobStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empType = #{model.empType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
sex = #{model.sex, jdbcType=SMALLINT} AND
birthday = #{model.birthday, jdbcType=DATE} AND
email = #{model.email, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
mobile = #{model.mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
telphone = #{model.telphone, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
avatar = #{model.avatar, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
state = #{model.state, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
user_id = #{model.userId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
custom1 = #{model.custom1, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
custom2 = #{model.custom2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
custom3 = #{model.custom3, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
custom4 = #{model.custom4, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
custom5 = #{model.custom5, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
( workNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or realName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or eName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or email like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or mobile like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or telphone like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or avatar like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or custom3 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or custom4 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or custom5 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(1) from t_user_info
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
workNo = #{model.workNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
realName = #{model.realName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
eName = #{model.eName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
compID = #{model.compID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
depID = #{model.depID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobID = #{model.jobID, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
reportTo = #{model.reportTo, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
wfreportTo = #{model.wfreportTo, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empStatus = #{model.empStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
jobStatus = #{model.jobStatus, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
empType = #{model.empType, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
sex = #{model.sex, jdbcType=SMALLINT} AND
birthday = #{model.birthday, jdbcType=DATE} AND
email = #{model.email, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
mobile = #{model.mobile, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
telphone = #{model.telphone, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
avatar = #{model.avatar, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
remark = #{model.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
state = #{model.state, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
user_id = #{model.userId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
custom1 = #{model.custom1, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
custom2 = #{model.custom2, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
custom3 = #{model.custom3, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
custom4 = #{model.custom4, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
custom5 = #{model.custom5, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
( workNo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or realName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or eName like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or email like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or mobile like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or telphone like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or avatar like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or remark like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or custom3 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or custom4 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or custom5 like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
select ui.user_id as userId, ui.*, c.compName from t_user_info ui left join t_company c on ui.`compID` = c.`id` where user_id = #{userId} limit 1
select ui.user_id as userId, ui.*, c.compName from t_user_info ui left join t_company c on ui.`compID` = c.`id` where user_id = #{userId}
select ui.user_id as userId, ui.*, c.compName from t_user_info ui left join t_company c on ui.`compID` = c.`id` where user_id = #{userId} and compID = #{compID}

select ui.user_id as userId, ui.*, c.compName from t_user_info ui left join t_user u on ui.user_id = u.user_id left join t_company c on ui.`compID` = c.`id` where u.user_name = #{userName} and ui.compID = #{compID} limit 1
mapper.update:
update t_user_info
workNo = #{workNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
realName = #{realName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
eName = #{eName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
compID = #{compID,jdbcType=INTEGER},
depID = #{depID,jdbcType=INTEGER},
jobID = #{jobID,jdbcType=INTEGER},
reportTo = #{reportTo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
wfreportTo = #{wfreportTo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
empStatus = #{empStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
jobStatus = #{jobStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
empType = #{empType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sex = #{sex,jdbcType=BIT},
birthday = #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mobile = #{mobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
telphone = #{telphone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
avatar = #{avatar,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER},
custom1 = #{custom1,jdbcType=INTEGER},
custom2 = #{custom2,jdbcType=INTEGER},
custom3 = #{custom3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
custom4 = #{custom4,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
custom5 = #{custom5,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where
id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER} and compID = #{compID,jdbcType=INTEGER}
